description.content:
Retrieve detailed information about a single IT equipment order using its unique identifier. This allows you to track the order's status, review shipping details, and see the associated product.  For more info, visit [Orders](https://developer.deel.com/docs/deel-it-api#orders)
 **Token scopes**: `it-orders:read`

variable.description: (Required) Unique identifier of the IT order

response.name: OK

variable.description: (Required) Unique identifier of the IT order

header.description:
(Required) ## Authentication
The Deel API uses bearer tokens to authenticate requests. All API calls must be made over HTTPS — calls over plain HTTP or without authentication will fail.

```curl
curl -X GET 'https://api.letsdeel.com/rest/v2/contracts' \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR-TOKEN-HERE'
```

[Learn more about authentication](/api/authentication)

description.content:
Retrieve a paginated list of all IT equipment orders for the organization. This is useful for reviewing both historical and current procurement requests to track overall equipment provisioning.  For more info, visit [Orders](https://developer.deel.com/docs/deel-it-api#orders).
 **Token scopes**: `it-orders:read`

query.description: Indicates where the next page of results starts, as returned in a paginated list response
Return a page of results with given number of records

response.name: OK

description.content:
Retrieve the details of a specific IT asset using its unique identifier. This allows you to check information such as the asset's model, serial number, status, and location.  For more info, visit [Assets](https://developer.deel.com/docs/deel-it-api#assets).
 **Token scopes**: `it-assets:read`

```curl
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR-TOKEN-HERE'
```

[Learn more about authentication](/api/authentication)

description.content:
Retrieve a paginated list of all IT assets managed by the organization. This is useful for getting a complete overview of your equipment inventory and understanding the state of each asset. For more info, visit [Assets](https://developer.deel.com/docs/deel-it-api#assets).
 **Token scopes**: `it-assets:read`

query.description: Indicates where the next page of results starts, as returned in a paginated list response
Return a page of results with given number of records
Filter assets by assigned worker with given HRIS Profile ID
Filter assets by their product category

response.name: OK

description.content:
Retrieve a list of all available IT hardware policies. These policies define the equipment that can be ordered.  For more info, visit [IT policies](https://developer.deel.com/docs/deel-it-api#it-policies).
 **Token scopes**: `it-policies:read`
